sample.fusion_html_head: <!DOCTYPE html><html lang="en"><head><meta charSet="utf-8"/><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1"/><link rel="stylesheet" href="/_next/static/chunks/%5Broot-of-the-server%5D__28bc9c2a._.css" data-precedence="next_static/chunks/[root-of-the-server]__28bc9c2a._.css"/><lin

payment_projection.note: S4 rates for receipts/ingest; settlement on gateway. Payment only with live hardware attestation + full mooring. See FUSION_PLANT_MOORING_AND_MESH_PAYMENT.md

nstxu_benchmark.comment: Operator doc: start feeder in a separate terminal; Refresh S4 only reads benchmark_pcs_shadow.json. NATS optional via NATS_URL + nats CLI.

flow_catalog_s4.user_flow_summary: Plug-and-play plant architecture: mount DMG → README_MEMBRANE → cell_onboard + gaia_mount → Discord membrane moor → optional NATS heartbeat → Fusion S⁴ UI (including Sovereign race leaderboard + GET /api/fusion/global-challenge-digest for game-room paste). Same app surface for cell-side Metal receipts, vendor PCS / facility harnesses, or live plant I/O (tokamak, stellarator, FRC, other magnetic concepts, or separate inertial plant classes) — backends swap via config and bridges; facility rows unlock on mooring + licensing + invoke witnesses, not a second product fork.

virtual_systems.label: Virtual tokamak — Metal control matrix
virtual_systems.description: Local GPU-fused validation (FusionControl). S4 receipt only; no live plasma. Use N cycles for a fixed batch, or the long-run cell loop / Turbo IDE for run-until-stopped.

virtual_systems.label: Virtual long-run loop
virtual_systems.description: Repeated virtual batches in fusion_cell_long_run_runner.sh until stop file, Turbo IDE F4, or fusion_cell_long_run_stop.sh. Configure cycles via deploy/fusion_cell/config.json virtual.env or projection.

virtual_systems.label: M⁸ benchmark surfaces (JSON)
virtual_systems.description: S4 measurement envelopes under config/benchmarks/ — ingest/manifold projection; not runnable binaries on the DMG.

production_systems_ui.label: Gym-TORAX / JAX (live bridge)
grey_reasons: Mesh moor incomplete: need cell_onboard + gaia_mount + fresh NATS mesh heartbeat (see FUSION_DM_VIRTUAL_AND_PRODUCTION.md).
Live bridge invoke unset for torax. Set fusion_projection.json bridges.torax.invoke or MCP_* env.

production_systems_ui.label: MARTe2 / real-time plant (live bridge)
grey_reasons: Mesh moor incomplete: need cell_onboard + gaia_mount + fresh NATS mesh heartbeat (see FUSION_DM_VIRTUAL_AND_PRODUCTION.md).
Live bridge invoke unset for marte2. Set fusion_projection.json bridges.marte2.invoke or MCP_* env.

production_systems_ui.label: Real tokamak / site PCS ingress
grey_reasons: Mesh moor incomplete: need cell_onboard + gaia_mount + fresh NATS mesh heartbeat (see FUSION_DM_VIRTUAL_AND_PRODUCTION.md).
Live hardware / plant license path not attested locally (~/.gaiaftcl/fusion_live_hardware.json). Gateway settles payment.

pcs_telemetry.disclaimer: T_e/T_i [keV] below are driven by evidence/fusion_control/benchmark_pcs_shadow.json (benchmark emulation). Not hardware attestation. Virtual batch chart remains Metal S⁴ receipts.

m8_feeder_contracts.mac_cli_hint: FusionSidecarHost --cli feeder start nstxu | FusionSidecarHost --cli feeder status

rows.title: ITER plant control / CODAC-style exception handling (PCSSP class)

pillar_numeric_witness.comparison_note: ε: worst |error| vs ceiling. τ_gpu: gpu_wall_us vs 5 ms / 3 ms (µs) — hot dispatch, default soak gate. τ_wall: full batch ms (warmup+GPU+verify) — rises under Mac load; use for contention studies.

witnesses.detail: no local codegen feeder wired — REFUSED until SCDDS receipt path
no local codegen feeder wired — REFUSED until SCDDS receipt path
no local codegen feeder wired — REFUSED until SCDDS receipt path

industry_validation.title: Three industry validation tracks
industry_validation.disclaimer: Each track lists what we measure and what “good” means. Green PASS on this page comes from your last Metal batch receipt and from the soak log files named below — not from marketing copy.

pillars.industry_standard: TokSys / GSevolve-class equilibrium reconstruction; NSTX-U benchmark lineage.
pillars.validation_goal: Run the OSTI-class virtual tokamak benchmark on Metal: equilibrium residual must stay under the published ceiling; wall time per batch is compared to 5 ms (industry) and 3 ms (internal target).
pillars.expected_s4_output: Logged worst |error| vs 9.54e-7 ceiling; logged batch wall ms vs 5 ms / 3 ms budgets. Prebuilt metallib moves shader cost to build time so timing reflects steady-state runs.
pillars.franklin_c4_note: Lost or invalid sensor path: block actuation until a closure receipt exists.

pillars.industry_standard: Standardized pulse schedules and exception-handling scenarios (PCSSP / CODAC-class protection narrative).
pillars.validation_goal: Inject PCSSP-style fault envelopes; every fault should produce a REFUSED terminal in the fault receipt log (no silent OK).
pillars.expected_s4_output: One JSONL line per injected fault: REFUSED + latency_ms; soak summary counts matches vs total.
pillars.franklin_c4_note: Alarm or sensor fault: heating/actuation stays blocked until closure.

pillars.industry_standard: JAX-based differentiable tokamak simulator (TORAX-class RL / optimal control research stack).
pillars.validation_goal: When TORAX (or your JAX episode runner) is enabled, log ΔH per virtual shot over long runs; chart trend in the console from the metrics file.
pillars.expected_s4_output: Lines in torax_episode_metrics.jsonl with delta_h per episode; UI shows last/min/max over the tail window.
pillars.franklin_c4_note: NaN or unstable rollout: refuse policy deploy until recovery is receipted.

state_protocol.s4_output_receipt: anchor.jwt verified (or equivalent mount / identity receipt on this mesh)
10-signal handshake (OK: true) or substrate health / NATS leaf witness
E_max < 9.54e-7 in batch receipt (strict inequality vs ceiling)
threshold_breach: true (or equivalent REFUSED precursor in logs)

global_sovereign_challenge.title: Global Sovereign Challenge — 275M EUR Sprint
global_sovereign_challenge.disclaimer: S⁴ projection only. Award pools, revenue triggers, and team counts become C⁴ truth only when sealed on the treasury/gateway ledger and Discord membrane receipts. UI never invents balances. Sprint line: 275M EUR revenue trigger (C⁴ ledger); 11-team challenger cap (S⁴).

hubs.challenge_s4: Witness shot-hour truth on the Metal matrix tail.
hubs.reward_c4_note: Pool per hub is a settlement target — executes only on ledger + moor rules in fusion_projection.

hubs.challenge_s4: Witness REBCO / HTS invariants against substrate timing receipts.
hubs.reward_c4_note: Same hub pool mechanics; no payout without C⁴ closure.

hubs.challenge_s4: Witness long-pulse stability vs cycle budget.
Witness sovereign plant attestation and IPR chain-of-title for the South Asia corridor.
hubs.reward_c4_note: Same hub pool mechanics; national filing receipts + ledger moor; no payout without C⁴ closure.

discord.game_room_note: Post digest + Fusion S4 link in your sovereign cell game room; one membrane, NKeys per cell.

discord_moor.hint: Owl cell: use /moor in Discord with a signed wallet message (substrate → authorized_wallets). This HTTP API has no Discord session; use GET /api/fusion/mesh-operator-spine from the bot host for Mac disk state only.

doc_links.owl_moor_message_template: inception:<your_discord_user_id> — full signed payload: GaiaFTCL Authentication + Timestamp + Message (see Owl verify_signature).

anchor_jwt.note: README_MEMBRANE: anchor.jwt may be JSON status until a real issuer wires — presence is S⁴ file witness only.

health_probe.error: GAIAFTCL_GATEWAY_URL unset — optional for local-only; set for universal_ingest probationary path.

projection_sample.s4_note: Labels and file witnesses only. C4 settlement remains gateway/treasury. Discord moor is substrate-side; complete per README_MEMBRANE.
